What we do

Full-service Evanston landscaping

From landscape design and paver patios to lawn care, tree installation and snow removal, Verdaleo handles every part of your Evanston or North Shore property — with one accountable team that knows your grounds intimately.

Landscape Design

Master plans and planting designs drawn for the way you actually live outdoors — rendered, refined and built to scale.

Garden & Planting

Perennial borders, native gardens, specimen trees and four-season color, sourced and installed for thriving long-term growth.

Hardscaping

Bluestone patios, paver driveways, walkways, steps and retaining walls — engineered to sit perfectly for decades.

Outdoor Living

Pergolas, outdoor kitchens, fire features and pavilions that turn the yard into the most-used room of the house.

Lawn Care & Maintenance

Mowing, edging, fertilization, aeration and weed control on a tailored schedule that keeps turf flawless all season.

Irrigation & Drainage

Smart sprinkler systems, drip lines and grading solutions that water precisely and keep foundations dry.

Tree & Shrub Care

Pruning, shaping, health treatments and seasonal feeding from crews trained to keep mature plantings vigorous.

Landscape Lighting

Low-voltage architectural and path lighting that draws out the best of your property after dusk — safely and beautifully.

Sod & Lawn Installation

Premium sod, seeding and full lawn renovation that delivers a thick, even carpet from the very first season.

Mulch & Bed Care

Fresh mulch, clean edges and weed-free beds that frame the garden and lock in moisture through the heat.

Seasonal Cleanups

Spring wake-ups and fall leaf-and-cutback service that reset the property and protect it for the months ahead.

Snow & Ice Management

Reliable drives-and-walks clearing and de-icing all winter, so the first property you protect is your own.

The Verdaleo studio

Rooted in this place, built for the long view.

Verdaleo — from verde, the green of a living landscape — was founded on a simple conviction: a great garden is grown, not installed. As Evanston landscapers, we design with the soil, light and architecture of each North Shore property in mind, then build with craftsmen who treat stone and plant with equal care.

Because landscape design, installation and care all live under one roof, the people who imagine your Evanston landscape are the same ones who tend it years later. That continuity is what lets a Verdaleo garden look more assured with every season.

Verdaleo
Design • Build • Care
How we work

Four seasons, four steps

A clear, unhurried path from first conversation to a landscape you'll love for decades.

01

Consultation

We walk the property with you, listen to how you want to live in it, and assess soil, light and structure.

02

Design

You receive a considered plan and planting palette, refined together until every detail feels right.

03

Build

Our own crews install hardscape and plantings with craftsmanship, on a schedule we keep you ahead of.

04

Care

Year-round maintenance keeps the landscape healthy and looking its best as it matures into itself.

Good to know

Evanston landscaping FAQ

Quick answers about our service area, services and estimates.

What areas does Verdaleo provide landscaping services in?

We provide landscaping in Evanston and throughout Chicago's North Shore, including Wilmette, Kenilworth, Winnetka, Glencoe, Skokie, Northbrook and Glenview. If you're nearby and not sure whether you're in our area, just ask.

What landscaping services do you offer in Evanston?

Full-service Evanston landscaping: landscape design, paver patios, retaining walls, driveway paving, stone walkways, landscape lighting, lawn care and maintenance, tree and shrub installation, seasonal cleanups and snow & ice management.

Do you handle both landscape design and installation?

Yes. Verdaleo is a design-build landscaping company, which means the same team designs, installs and maintains your landscape. You get one accountable point of contact from the first sketch through long-term care.

How do I get a free landscaping estimate in Evanston?

Call (224) 432‑9436 or complete the request form below and we'll schedule a free on-site consultation and estimate — usually within one business day.
